name: Product Defects
description: Assertion failures indicating a real API bug

name: Schema Validation Failures
description: Response body does not match the expected JSON schema

name: Test Defects
description: Errors in test code itself (NPE, class cast, etc.)

name: Infrastructure / Network Issues
description: Connection timeouts, DNS failures, server errors

name: Timeout Errors
description: Requests that exceeded the configured timeout

name: Skipped / Disabled
description: Tests that were intentionally skipped or disabled
